zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Marion Cochran於1520年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親John Cochrane30歲，母親Marion Elizabeth Stewart20歲。她於1538年與James Thompson在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1595年在蘇格蘭享年75歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Marion Cochran于1520年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲John Cochrane30岁，母亲Marion Elizabeth Stewart20岁。她于1538年与James Thompson在苏格兰費伏登福姆林结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1595年在苏格兰享年75岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: Cochran
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire): habitational name from the lands of Cochrane in the parish of Paisley, near Glasgow. The placename is of uncertain derivation, perhaps from Welsh coch ‘red’, although this etymology is not supported by the early spelling Coueran.

variants.name: Cothran
meanings: Perhaps also English: variant of   Cawthorne  .

variants.name: Coughran
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Cochran  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Cothren
meanings: Perhpas alsoa variant of English   Cawthorne  .

variants.name: Cochren
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Cochran  . This name is extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Cochrum
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Cochran   or English   Cockerham  .

variants.name: Caughron
meanings: Shortened and altered form of Irish   McCaghren  .

variants.name: Cothron
meanings: Perhaps also English: variant of   Cawthorne  .

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Marion Cochran was born in 1520, in Scotland, her father, John Cochrane, was 30 and her mother, Marion Elizabeth Stewart, was 20. She married James Thompson in 1538, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1595, in Scotland, at the age of 75, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Marion Cochran est née en 1520, à Écosse, son père, John Cochrane, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marion Elizabeth Stewart, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé James Thompson en 1538, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1595, à Écosse, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse.

de.London St Giles without Cripplegate, Mid: London St Giles without Cripplegate, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Marion Cochran 1520 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cochrane 30 und ihre Mutter Marion Elizabeth Stewart 20. Sie hat 1538 in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland James Thompson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1595 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marion Cochran è nata il nel 1520 nel Scotland, sua padre, John Cochrane, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Marion Elizabeth Stewart, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato James Thompson nel 1538, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1595, nel Scotland, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Marion Cochranが1520年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父John Cochraneは30歳，母Marion Elizabeth Stewartは20歳であった。1538年にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインでJames Thompsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1595年にスコットランドで75歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Marion Cochran(이)가 1520년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cochrane(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marion Elizabeth Stewart(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1538년 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 James Thompson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 스컷랜드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marion Cochran nasceu em 1520, em Scotland, seu pai, John Cochrane, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marion Elizabeth Stewart, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com James Thompson em 1538, em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.London St Giles without Cripplegate, Mid: лондон ст джилесь витоут крипплегэит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Marion Cochran родилась в 1520 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Cochrane было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Elizabeth Stewart, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Thompson в 1538 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1595 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия.
